analysis: The project appears to be a static website focused on black holes with interactive elements. The existing files suggest a dark cosmic theme with animated slides and interactive planets. The CSS needs completion for the full black hole theme, and the HTML/JavaScript require updates for proper functionality including mobile navigation and event handlers.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Add Egyptian-themed color palette and UI elements as described in the intent.

Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices. Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.

Fix the syntax errors in the showSlide function and complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented. Add event listeners and functionality for the new buttons added in test-website/index.html. Implement the mobile menu toggle functionality with proper event handling, smooth transitions, and user-friendly interactions.
